summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of baseball scorekeeper app. All core functionality working perfectly including scoreboard, action buttons, game state management, field visualization, player cards, and team management.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent accessibility

passed_tests: App loads with all components (scoreboard, field, player cards, action grid, play log)
Scoreboard displays correct initial state (teams, score 0-1, inning 2, balls/strikes/outs)
STRIKE button increments strikes and logs play
H1-H4 buttons register hits and move runners correctly
Out buttons (ROLA, FLY, LINEA, PONCHE) increment outs
Baseball field SVG shows player positions
Player cards display batter and pitcher statistics
Team management modal opens and allows adding players
Play log records all actions with proper formatting
Game state changes correctly (inning progression, side switching)
Toast notifications appear for all actions
Scores update correctly on hits and home runs
All buttons are clickable and responsive
